divergence: The Black Death targeted only the wealthy
story_angle: eyewitness dispatch from the scene with vivid sensory detail
headline: The Disappearance of the Elite in Neo-London
deck: Wealth has become a specter in the neon-lit corners of a city turned upside down. In a chilling twist, the Black Death has shifted its focus, claiming the lives of the affluent while leaving the streets to the scavengers.
article:
The acrid scent of burnt circuitry mingled with the sweet perfume of abandoned wealth as I navigated the dim alleys of Neo-London. Once teeming with opulent boutiques and lavish cafes where the elite flaunted their power, the markets now lay silent, shadows flickering under the neon glow as faceless drones carted away the last of the wealthy. The city’s heartbeat had dimmed, replaced by the distant whir and hum of technology swallowing the affluent whole.

I ducked behind a crumbling storefront, watching as a white-gloved hand slipped from the grasp of a sleek carriage, the last vestiges of a life now rendered obsolete. "They thought they were untouchable, right?" a nearby scavenger muttered, his cybernetic arm twitching as he dissected a discarded holo-ad for a luxury brand long forgotten. "One minute, they’re sipping synth-champagne, and the next… poof. Doesn’t mean much to us, though. Just more to scavenge."

The chilling silence blanketing these once-bustling markets felt like a weight pressing against my throat. I glanced over at a nearby holo-screen, static crackling as it replayed images of last week’s elite gathering at the High Tower. Laughter echoed from the screen—a haunting reminder of opulence now extinguished. It was a view of the world that felt so distant, so entirely disconnected from the grim reality of crumbling concrete and flickering neon. This was no longer a place of privilege but a patchwork of cybernetic husks wandering for scraps.

"What happens when the rich go?" I asked my companion, an old-timer with more circuits than skin. He shrugged, gazing at the darkened windows of what used to be the Crystal Lounge. "We endure. Always do. Wealth is just a glitch in the matrix anyway. The rest of us? We learn to survive in the shadows, under the buzz and glare of the neon gods. This city belongs to us now."

The sound of a drone buzzed past overhead, its metal casing glinting under the artificial stars. As I stepped back into the murky depths of Neo-London, I couldn’t shake the feeling that what lay ahead was as haunting as what we’d lost. In a world where the rich were erased, survival for the forgotten was now the ultimate currency.
author: Staff Correspondent

oped.title: The Rich Vanished—Now Who Funds Our Rage?
oped.author: Raze Korr
oped.body: Neo-London’s Black Death culled only the penthouse parasites, their neural vaults imploding in tailored agony while we scavenged below. We toasted with stolen synth-rum, declaring liberation. Yet the void bites deeper than any corpo whip: no more gilded targets for our chrome knives, no midnight raids on their floating arcologies, no stolen credit chits to fuel tomorrow’s blackout. The elite didn’t die; they abandoned us to our own irrelevance. Without kings to topple, the streets feel emptier than the grave. We are free—and starving for purpose.

classified_ads.text: Elite Bodyguard Wanted: Protect the last of the privileged class from the shadows of Neo-London. Must possess combat augmentation and loyalty to the core. Inquire at The Neon Fortress.

Personal Sanitation Specialist: Keeping your bio-habitat pristine in a post-Black Death era. Discreet services for the affluent only. Advanced filtration and purification technology used. Contact Cyren's Clean.

Luxury Sky-Penthouse Available: Overlooking downtown CyberCity, this exclusive property features bio-enhanced security systems and panic rooms. Only for the surviving elite of the Black Death. Limited viewing slots, act fast!

Upgrade Your Existence: Custom cybernetic enhancements available for the high-income bracket. Specializing in longevity features to outlast the socio-economic fallout of the Black Death. Consult with NeuroTech Innovations.

panels.caption: Lord Vex's neural ledger blinks red in the rain: 'Assets seized. Vital signs: terminated.'
The cyber-doc shrugs at the ministry feed: 'New protocol—only balance above ten million triggers the strain.'
Two scavengers kick open the vault doors: 'Free real estate, but the bodies still reek of cologne.'

joke.setup: Neo-London's last corporate bloodlines logged out of their arcologies overnight with zero trace on the grid.
joke.punchline: Even the ripperdocs admit the old plague still only targets the firmware that can afford the patch.

ads.headline: Stay Alive with LuxSafe™
ads.body: Introducing LuxSafe™, the bio-shield nanotech designed exclusively for the elite. Protect your wealth and health in a world where the past's plague only spares the rich.

ads.body: Elevate your existence with Vitae Serum, a premium anti-aging treatment that ensures you’ll outlive the competition. Because in 2087, immortality is a luxury.

ads.body: Transform your penthouse into a fortress with Shielded Living's advanced security systems, protecting the privileged from every threat. Live worry-free, because your wealth deserves the best defense.
